message:
🐛 Show offline clusters in all cluster dropdowns with status indicators (#798)

Offline/unreachable clusters were hidden from cluster filter dropdowns,
making it impossible to see which clusters were offline. Now all clusters
are shown with health status indicators (green=healthy, yellow=offline),
and offline clusters are visible but not selectable.

Changes:
- cardHooks.ts: Include unreachable clusters in availableClusters for
  dropdown display while keeping data filtering reachable-only
- useLocalClusterFilter.ts: Same pattern - separate display from data
- CardComponents.tsx: Disable unreachable clusters in CardClusterFilter
- ClusterFilterDropdown.tsx: Add ClusterStatusDot and disabled state
- ClusterSelect.tsx: New shared single-select dropdown with health dots
- ResourceMarshall.tsx: Replace native <select> with ClusterSelect

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
